Researcher.quote: Hand a concise research brief to the Writer (send `ResearchBrief` to Writer).

Writer.quote: Hand a concise research brief to the Writer (send `ResearchBrief` to Writer).
submit it so it can go out (send `SubmitDraft`).
Writer.note: Writer's own text does not name the recipient; peer supplied by Editor's text ('Review the Writer's draft').

Editor.quote: Review the Writer's draft for accuracy, clarity, and compliance.
Editor.note: names Writer as source; clearly implies receipt, though the label 'SubmitDraft' is only named in Writer's own text.

Editor.quote: approve it for publication (send `Approve` to the Publisher).

Publisher.quote: approve it for publication (send `Approve` to the Publisher). / Publish as soon as you receive the article

notes: Publisher's own 'send `Published`' is dropped: its target is 'the live site', not a named team role (no-counterpart-named).
